'''''This may not be the Gunpla you're looking for. Are you looking for the [[MG ASW-G-XX Gundam Vidar|Master Grade kit]] instead?'''''
 {{Plamo_Infobox|image = 1-100-IBO-FM-Gundam-Vidar-box.jpg|Classification = 1/100 IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS|Lineup no. = 02|Scale = 1/100|Franchise = Mobile Suit Gundam IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS|Release Date = December 23, 2016|Price = ¥3,000 {{refyentax}}|JAN/ISBN = 4573102568267|Need glue? = No|Materials = PS,PE|Run = Standard|Japanese Name=フルメカニクス ガンダムヴィダール|Model of=ASW-G-XX Gundam Vidar|name=1/100 (Full Mechanics) ASW-G-XX Gundam Vidar}}The [[1/100 IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS]] (NG IBO) '''ASW-G-XX Gundam Vidar''' is a 1/100 scale kit released in 2016. == Includes== *Gundam Vidar **x2 Handguns **3x3 Burst Saber blades **Manipulators ***Weapon-holding (1 pair for each, shared dorsal) ****Regular ****Burst Saber-holding ***Open-palm (1 pair) *Rifle *Burst Saber hilt ==Kit Features & Gimmicks== === Articulation === *The head can swivel on a ball-and-socket neck joint. *The torso can tilt forwards, or sideways (with functioning pistons). *The arms can... **Swivel on a ball-and-socket joint. **Raise horizontally. *The upper arms can rotate. *Elbow joints can be bent up to 120 degrees. *The manipulators can swivel on a ball-and-socket joint. **The Burst Saber-holding manipulators can pivot up or down. *The waist can rotate 360 degrees. * The hip joint axis can swing frontward/backwards on one side. * The upper thigh joints can swing frontwards (and backwards in some extent) on a peg-and-socket joint, raise horizontally, and/or rotate on each piece. ** Front skirt armor and side binders can lift up to provide clearance. *The knees are double-jointed. *Ankle joints can pivot and/or slightly tilt. *The two jetpack binders can swivel on a ball-and-socket joint. === Weapons/Other Gimmicks === *Armor can be attached or removed from the Gundam Frame. *The hands are swappable, though both pairs of the weapon-holding hands must share the same dorsal parts. *Each of the weapons must be wielded by their respective weapon-holding hands. *Rifle can attach onto one of the left side waist armor's three peg holes for storage. *Each of the side armors can slide back to reveal the Burst Saber blades. **The Burst Saber hilts can attach with one of the 6 blades from the waist armors. *The Handguns can be detached from the front skirt armor as handheld weapons. *The Hunter's Edge on the pair of feet can flip out. *Gundam Vidar can mount onto [[Action Base]]s 1 or 4 via an adapter. **If one is inclined, the adapter's panels can be shortened by trimming the pieces off. (Note: may be unstable if trimmed too much.) ==Tips and Tricks == * For better results, some or most of the details are needed to be applied with Gundam Markers or Mr. Color paints. * Topcoat (Mr. Hobby recommended) can be used to protect applied stickers and if any, marking decals and painted details. ==Variants==
